Series de Tiempo — Panel Macroeconómico México

paquetes <- c("httr", "jsonlite", "quantmod", "tidyquant", "tidyverse",
              "lubridate", "tseries", "forecast", "ggplot2", "xts",
              "zoo", "PerformanceAnalytics", "corrplot", "urca", "vars")

nuevos <- paquetes[!(paquetes %in% installed.packages()[,"Package"])]
if(length(nuevos)) install.packages(nuevos)

library(httr);     library(jsonlite);  library(quantmod)
library(tidyquant); library(tidyverse); library(lubridate)
library(tseries);  library(forecast);  library(ggplot2)
library(xts);      library(zoo);       library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(corrplot);  library(urca);      library(vars)
banxico_get_series <- function(ids, token, fecha_inicio, fecha_fin) {
  ids_str <- paste(ids, collapse = ",")
  url <- paste0(
    "https://www.banxico.org.mx/SieAPIRest/service/v1/series/",
    ids_str, "/datos/", fecha_inicio, "/", fecha_fin
  )
  resp <- GET(url, add_headers("Bmx-Token" = token))
  if (status_code(resp) != 200) stop("Error API Banxico: ", status_code(resp))
  contenido <- fromJSON(content(resp, "text", encoding = "UTF-8"))
  return(contenido$bmx$series)
}

extraer_serie <- function(series_list, id_serie) {
  serie <- series_list[series_list$idSerie == id_serie, ]
  datos <- serie$datos[[1]]
  
  datos$dato <- gsub(",", "", datos$dato)
  datos$dato <- trimws(datos$dato)
  datos$dato[datos$dato == "N/E"] <- NA
  datos$dato[datos$dato == ""]    <- NA
  
  df <- data.frame(
    fecha = as.Date(datos$fecha, format = "%d/%m/%Y"),
    valor = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(datos$dato))
  )
  df <- df[!is.na(df$valor), ]
  return(df)
}
token_banxico <- "b6c34a21baba92a643d35435ab59892feb38ec46a94e24e52e7948da583fa644"

ids_banxico <- c(
  "SF61745",   # Tasa objetivo
  "SF60648",   # TIIE 28 días
  "SF60633",   # Cetes 28 días
  "SF43718",   # Tipo de cambio FIX MXN/USD
  "SF43707",   # Reservas internacionales
  "SP1",       # INPC mensual
  "SF311408",  # M1
  "SF311418",  # M2
  "SP74625"    # Inflación subyacente
)

fecha_inicio <- "2005-01-01"
fecha_fin    <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")

series_raw <- banxico_get_series(ids_banxico, token_banxico, fecha_inicio, fecha_fin)

tasa_obj <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SF61745")
tiie28   <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SF60648")
cetes28  <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SF60633")
tc_fix   <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SF43718")
reservas <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SF43707")
inpc     <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SP1")
m1       <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SF311408")
m2       <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SF311418")
inf_sub  <- extraer_serie(series_raw, "SP74625")

cat("=== Filas por serie Banxico ===\n")
## === Filas por serie Banxico ===
for (nombre in c("tasa_obj","tiie28","cetes28","tc_fix",
                 "reservas","inpc","m1","m2","inf_sub")) {
  cat(sprintf("%-12s: %d filas\n", nombre, nrow(get(nombre))))
}
## tasa_obj    : 6565 filas
## tiie28      : 5353 filas
## cetes28     : 1022 filas
## tc_fix      : 5353 filas
## reservas    : 1110 filas
## inpc        : 255 filas
## m1          : 254 filas
## m2          : 254 filas
## inf_sub     : 255 filas
tickers_yahoo <- c("^MXX", "MXN=X", "^GSPC", "GC=F", "CL=F")

getSymbols(tickers_yahoo,
           src  = "yahoo",
           from = fecha_inicio,
           to   = fecha_fin,
           auto.assign = TRUE)
## [1] "MXX"   "MXN=X" "GSPC"  "GC=F"  "CL=F"
ipc_bmv  <- Ad(`MXX`)
mxn_usd  <- Ad(`MXN=X`)
sp500    <- Ad(`GSPC`)
oro      <- Ad(`GC=F`)
petroleo <- Ad(`CL=F`)

getSymbols(c("FEDFUNDS", "CPIAUCSL"),
           src  = "FRED",
           from = fecha_inicio,
           to   = fecha_fin,
           auto.assign = TRUE)
## [1] "FEDFUNDS" "CPIAUCSL"
df_to_xts <- function(df) {
  df$fecha <- as.Date(df$fecha)
  df       <- df[!is.na(df$valor), ]
  if (nrow(df) == 0) return(xts())
  xts(df$valor, order.by = df$fecha)
}

tasa_obj_xts <- df_to_xts(tasa_obj)
tiie28_xts   <- df_to_xts(tiie28)
cetes28_xts  <- df_to_xts(cetes28)
tc_fix_xts   <- df_to_xts(tc_fix)
reservas_xts <- df_to_xts(reservas)
inpc_xts     <- df_to_xts(inpc)
m1_xts       <- df_to_xts(m1)
m2_xts       <- df_to_xts(m2)
inf_sub_xts  <- df_to_xts(inf_sub)

cat("=== Observaciones por xts ===\n")
## === Observaciones por xts ===
for (nombre in c("tasa_obj_xts","tiie28_xts","cetes28_xts","tc_fix_xts",
                 "reservas_xts","inpc_xts","m1_xts","m2_xts","inf_sub_xts")) {
  cat(sprintf("%-15s: %d obs\n", nombre, nrow(get(nombre))))
}
## tasa_obj_xts   : 6565 obs
## tiie28_xts     : 5353 obs
## cetes28_xts    : 1022 obs
## tc_fix_xts     : 5353 obs
## reservas_xts   : 1110 obs
## inpc_xts       : 255 obs
## m1_xts         : 254 obs
## m2_xts         : 254 obs
## inf_sub_xts    : 255 obs
a_mensual <- function(s) {
  if (nrow(s) == 0) stop(paste("Serie vacía:", deparse(substitute(s))))
  to.monthly(s, indexAt = "firstof", OHLC = FALSE)
}

panel_mensual <- merge(
  a_mensual(tasa_obj_xts), a_mensual(tiie28_xts),
  a_mensual(cetes28_xts),  a_mensual(tc_fix_xts),
  a_mensual(reservas_xts), a_mensual(inpc_xts),
  a_mensual(m1_xts),       a_mensual(m2_xts),
  a_mensual(inf_sub_xts),  a_mensual(ipc_bmv),
  a_mensual(mxn_usd),      a_mensual(sp500),
  a_mensual(oro),          a_mensual(petroleo),
  FEDFUNDS, CPIAUCSL,
  join = "inner"
)

colnames(panel_mensual) <- c(
  "tasa_obj", "tiie28", "cetes28", "tc_fix",
  "reservas", "inpc", "m1", "m2", "inf_sub",
  "ipc_bmv", "mxn_usd", "sp500", "oro",
  "petroleo", "fed_funds", "cpi_usa"
)

panel_df <- as.data.frame(panel_mensual) %>%
  rownames_to_column("fecha") %>%
  mutate(fecha = as.Date(fecha)) %>%
  drop_na()

cat(sprintf("\nPanel final: %d filas x %d columnas\n", nrow(panel_df), ncol(panel_df)))
## 
## Panel final: 217 filas x 17 columnas
## EDA
panel_long <- panel_df %>%
  pivot_longer(-fecha, names_to = "serie", values_to = "valor")

ggplot(panel_long, aes(x = fecha, y = valor)) +
  geom_line(color = "steelblue", linewidth = 0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~serie, scales = "free_y", ncol = 3) +
  labs(title = "Series de Tiempo — Panel Macroeconómico México",
       x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10)

summary(panel_df)
##      fecha               tasa_obj          tiie28          cetes28      
##  Min.   :2008-01-01   Min.   : 3.000   Min.   : 3.279   Min.   : 2.740  
##  1st Qu.:2012-07-01   1st Qu.: 4.500   1st Qu.: 4.750   1st Qu.: 4.180  
##  Median :2017-01-01   Median : 5.250   Median : 5.574   Median : 5.380  
##  Mean   :2016-12-31   Mean   : 6.196   Mean   : 6.507   Mean   : 6.079  
##  3rd Qu.:2021-07-01   3rd Qu.: 7.750   3rd Qu.: 8.120   3rd Qu.: 7.720  
##  Max.   :2026-02-01   Max.   :11.250   Max.   :11.550   Max.   :11.340

##        m2               inf_sub          ipc_bmv         mxn_usd      
##  Min.   :3.541e+09   Min.   : 68.94   Min.   :17752   Min.   : 9.966  
##  1st Qu.:5.100e+09   1st Qu.: 82.45   1st Qu.:37459   1st Qu.:13.099  
##  Median :7.556e+09   Median : 93.97   Median :43943   Median :17.283  
##  Mean   :8.227e+09   Mean   : 99.17   Mean   :43393   Mean   :16.591  
##  3rd Qu.:1.069e+10   3rd Qu.:112.82   3rd Qu.:49699   3rd Qu.:19.491  
##  Max.   :1.663e+10   Max.   :143.99   Max.   :71406   Max.   :24.214  
##      sp500             oro            petroleo        fed_funds    
##  Min.   : 735.1   Min.   : 716.8   Min.   : 18.84   Min.   :0.050  
##  1st Qu.:1406.6   1st Qu.:1220.2   1st Qu.: 54.18   1st Qu.:0.110  
##  Median :2278.9   Median :1396.1   Median : 71.65   Median :0.240  
##  Mean   :2768.9   Mean   :1605.2   Mean   : 72.64   Mean   :1.383  
##  3rd Qu.:3955.0   3rd Qu.:1795.0   3rd Qu.: 90.79   3rd Qu.:2.200  
##  Max.   :6939.0   Max.   :5230.5   Max.   :140.00   Max.   :5.330  
##     cpi_usa     
##  Min.   :211.4  
##  1st Qu.:229.2  
##  Median :243.6  
##  Mean   :253.9  
##  3rd Qu.:271.9  
##  Max.   :327.5
cor_matrix <- cor(panel_df[,-1], use = "complete.obs")
corrplot(cor_matrix, method = "color", type = "upper",
         tl.cex = 0.7, addCoef.col = "black", number.cex = 0.5)

## Estacionariedad
series_nombres <- colnames(panel_df)[-1]

resultados_adf <- map_dfr(series_nombres, function(nombre) {
  serie <- na.omit(panel_df[[nombre]])
  test  <- adf.test(serie)
  tibble(
    serie        = nombre,
    estadistico  = round(test$statistic, 4),
    p_valor      = round(test$p.value, 4),
    estacionaria = ifelse(test$p.value < 0.05, "Sí", "No")
  )
})

print(resultados_adf)
## # A tibble: 16 × 4
##    serie     estadistico p_valor estacionaria
##    <chr>           <dbl>   <dbl> <chr>       
##  1 tasa_obj      -3.41    0.054  No          
##  2 tiie28        -3.36    0.0625 No          
##  3 cetes28       -3.58    0.0365 Sí          
##  4 tc_fix        -1.83    0.648  No          
##  5 reservas      -1.52    0.777  No          
##  6 inpc           0.0901  0.99   No          
##  7 m1            -0.837   0.957  No          
##  8 m2             1.01    0.99   No          
##  9 inf_sub        0.335   0.99   No          
## 10 ipc_bmv       -2.49    0.370  No          
## 11 mxn_usd       -1.81    0.654  No          
## 12 sp500         -0.948   0.945  No          
## 13 oro            3.70    0.99   No          
## 14 petroleo      -3.34    0.065  No          
## 15 fed_funds     -3.02    0.148  No          
## 16 cpi_usa       -1.01    0.935  No
panel_diff <- panel_df %>%
  mutate(across(-fecha, ~c(NA, diff(.)))) %>%
  drop_na()
## Descomposición
inpc_ts <- ts(panel_df$inpc,
              start     = c(year(min(panel_df$fecha)),
                            month(min(panel_df$fecha))),
              frequency = 12)

descomp_inpc <- stl(inpc_ts, s.window = "periodic")
autoplot(descomp_inpc) +
  labs(title = "Descomposición STL — INPC") +
  theme_minimal()

tc_ts <- ts(panel_df$tc_fix,
            start     = c(year(min(panel_df$fecha)),
                          month(min(panel_df$fecha))),
            frequency = 12)

descomp_tc <- stl(tc_ts, s.window = "periodic")
autoplot(descomp_tc) +
  labs(title = "Descomposición STL — Tipo de Cambio FIX") +
  theme_minimal()

## ARIMA
modelo_arima_inpc <- auto.arima(inpc_ts, seasonal = TRUE,
                                stepwise = FALSE, approximation = FALSE)
summary(modelo_arima_inpc)
## Series: inpc_ts 
## ARIMA(1,1,2)(0,1,2)[12] 
## 
## Coefficients:
##          ar1      ma1      ma2     sma1    sma2
##       0.9753  -0.6369  -0.2298  -0.9924  0.1000
## s.e.  0.0265   0.0787   0.0783   0.0971  0.1022
## 
## sigma^2 = 0.06986:  log likelihood = -24.73
## AIC=61.45   AICc=61.88   BIC=81.36
## 
## Training set error measures:
##                      ME      RMSE       MAE         MPE      MAPE       MASE
## Training set 0.01096243 0.2531168 0.1705967 0.007999718 0.1664199 0.03924275
##                     ACF1
## Training set -0.01727514
autoplot(forecast(modelo_arima_inpc, h = 12)) +
  labs(title = "Pronóstico ARIMA — INPC (12 meses)",
       x = "Fecha", y = "INPC") +
  theme_minimal()

modelo_arima_tc <- auto.arima(tc_ts, seasonal = TRUE,
                               stepwise = FALSE, approximation = FALSE)
summary(modelo_arima_tc)
## Series: tc_ts 
## ARIMA(0,1,0) 
## 
## sigma^2 = 0.3547:  log likelihood = -194.56
## AIC=391.11   AICc=391.13   BIC=394.49
## 
## Training set error measures:
##                      ME      RMSE       MAE      MPE     MAPE     MASE
## Training set 0.02951118 0.5942059 0.4191186 0.155976 2.479004 0.271492
##                    ACF1
## Training set 0.02924124
autoplot(forecast(modelo_arima_tc, h = 12)) +
  labs(title = "Pronóstico ARIMA — Tipo de Cambio FIX (12 meses)",
       x = "Fecha", y = "MXN/USD") +
  theme_minimal()

## VAR
vars_modelo <- panel_diff %>%
  dplyr::select(tasa_obj, inpc, tc_fix, reservas, fed_funds) %>%
  drop_na()

orden_var <- VARselect(vars_modelo, lag.max = 12, type = "const")
p_optimo  <- orden_var$selection["AIC(n)"]

modelo_var <- VAR(vars_modelo, p = p_optimo, type = "const")
summary(modelo_var)
## 
## VAR Estimation Results:
## ========================= 
## Endogenous variables: tasa_obj, inpc, tc_fix, reservas, fed_funds 
## Deterministic variables: const 
## Sample size: 213 
## Log Likelihood: -1889.293 
## Roots of the characteristic polynomial:
## 0.9108 0.7353 0.7192 0.7192 0.5873 0.5873 0.5781 0.5781 0.5324 0.5324 0.4578 0.4274 0.4274 0.3668 0.3668
## Call:
## VAR(y = vars_modelo, p = p_optimo, type = "const")
## 
## 
## Estimation results for equation tasa_obj: 
## ========================================= 
## tasa_obj = tasa_obj.l1 + inpc.l1 + tc_fix.l1 + reservas.l1 + fed_funds.l1 + tasa_obj.l2 + inpc.l2 + tc_fix.l2 + reservas.l2 + fed_funds.l2 + tasa_obj.l3 + inpc.l3 + tc_fix.l3 + reservas.l3 + fed_funds.l3 + const 
## 
##                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## tasa_obj.l1   1.579e-01  6.440e-02   2.451  0.01511 *  
## inpc.l1       7.264e-02  3.837e-02   1.893  0.05981 .  
## tc_fix.l1     1.960e-02  2.270e-02   0.863  0.38898    
## reservas.l1  -1.222e-05  5.642e-06  -2.166  0.03151 *  
## fed_funds.l1  3.493e-01  1.143e-01   3.055  0.00256 ** 
## tasa_obj.l2   1.617e-01  6.400e-02   2.527  0.01231 *  
## inpc.l2      -3.721e-02  4.183e-02  -0.890  0.37478    
## tc_fix.l2    -3.713e-04  2.245e-02  -0.017  0.98683    
## reservas.l2   2.651e-06  5.663e-06   0.468  0.64025    
## fed_funds.l2 -2.110e-01  1.343e-01  -1.570  0.11792    
## tasa_obj.l3   4.089e-01  6.367e-02   6.422 9.83e-10 ***
## inpc.l3       1.187e-02  3.779e-02   0.314  0.75385    
## tc_fix.l3    -6.395e-02  2.188e-02  -2.923  0.00388 ** 
## reservas.l3  -2.126e-06  5.727e-06  -0.371  0.71093    
## fed_funds.l3  1.629e-02  9.883e-02   0.165  0.86922    
## const        -8.164e-03  2.209e-02  -0.370  0.71208    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1723 on 197 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-Squared: 0.5321,  Adjusted R-squared: 0.4964 
## F-statistic: 14.93 on 15 and 197 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16 
## 
## 
## Estimation results for equation inpc: 
## ===================================== 
## inpc = tasa_obj.l1 + inpc.l1 + tc_fix.l1 + reservas.l1 + fed_funds.l1 + tasa_obj.l2 + inpc.l2 + tc_fix.l2 + reservas.l2 + fed_funds.l2 + tasa_obj.l3 + inpc.l3 + tc_fix.l3 + reservas.l3 + fed_funds.l3 + const 
## 
##                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## tasa_obj.l1   1.472e-01  1.201e-01   1.225   0.2220    
## inpc.l1       5.002e-01  7.159e-02   6.987 4.22e-11 ***
## tc_fix.l1     3.313e-02  4.235e-02   0.782   0.4349    
## reservas.l1  -5.563e-07  1.053e-05  -0.053   0.9579    
## fed_funds.l1  4.435e-01  2.133e-01   2.080   0.0389 *  
## tasa_obj.l2  -1.778e-02  1.194e-01  -0.149   0.8817    
## inpc.l2      -1.245e-01  7.804e-02  -1.595   0.1123    
## tc_fix.l2     8.180e-02  4.189e-02   1.953   0.0523 .  
## reservas.l2  -1.057e-05  1.057e-05  -1.000   0.3186    
## fed_funds.l2 -2.950e-01  2.506e-01  -1.177   0.2407    
## tasa_obj.l3  -5.210e-02  1.188e-01  -0.439   0.6614    
## inpc.l3       8.517e-02  7.050e-02   1.208   0.2285    
## tc_fix.l3     1.757e-03  4.082e-02   0.043   0.9657    
## reservas.l3   1.571e-05  1.069e-05   1.471   0.1430    
## fed_funds.l3  6.073e-02  1.844e-01   0.329   0.7422    
## const         1.906e-01  4.121e-02   4.626 6.74e-06 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.3215 on 197 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-Squared: 0.2824,  Adjusted R-squared: 0.2278 
## F-statistic: 5.169 on 15 and 197 DF,  p-value: 1.26e-08 
## 
## 
## Estimation results for equation tc_fix: 
## ======================================= 
## tc_fix = tasa_obj.l1 + inpc.l1 + tc_fix.l1 + reservas.l1 + fed_funds.l1 + tasa_obj.l2 + inpc.l2 + tc_fix.l2 + reservas.l2 + fed_funds.l2 + tasa_obj.l3 + inpc.l3 + tc_fix.l3 + reservas.l3 + fed_funds.l3 + const 
## 
##                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)  
## tasa_obj.l1  -6.324e-02  2.229e-01  -0.284   0.7769  
## inpc.l1       5.696e-03  1.328e-01   0.043   0.9658  
## tc_fix.l1     2.140e-02  7.855e-02   0.272   0.7856  
## reservas.l1   3.310e-05  1.952e-05   1.695   0.0916 .
## fed_funds.l1 -9.191e-02  3.956e-01  -0.232   0.8165  
## tasa_obj.l2   4.695e-01  2.215e-01   2.120   0.0353 *
## inpc.l2      -1.610e-01  1.447e-01  -1.112   0.2674  
## tc_fix.l2    -3.132e-02  7.771e-02  -0.403   0.6873  
## reservas.l2  -1.979e-05  1.960e-05  -1.010   0.3140  
## fed_funds.l2  1.620e-01  4.649e-01   0.348   0.7279  
## tasa_obj.l3   1.109e-02  2.203e-01   0.050   0.9599  
## inpc.l3      -6.844e-02  1.308e-01  -0.523   0.6013  
## tc_fix.l3    -7.337e-02  7.571e-02  -0.969   0.3337  
## reservas.l3  -3.420e-05  1.982e-05  -1.725   0.0860 .
## fed_funds.l3 -7.689e-01  3.420e-01  -2.248   0.0257 *
## const         1.328e-01  7.644e-02   1.737   0.0839 .
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.5963 on 197 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-Squared: 0.08286, Adjusted R-squared: 0.01303 
## F-statistic: 1.187 on 15 and 197 DF,  p-value: 0.2846 
## 
## 
## Estimation results for equation reservas: 
## ========================================= 
## reservas = tasa_obj.l1 + inpc.l1 + tc_fix.l1 + reservas.l1 + fed_funds.l1 + tasa_obj.l2 + inpc.l2 + tc_fix.l2 + reservas.l2 + fed_funds.l2 + tasa_obj.l3 + inpc.l3 + tc_fix.l3 + reservas.l3 + fed_funds.l3 + const 
## 
##                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## tasa_obj.l1   1.604e+02  7.913e+02   0.203 0.839546    
## inpc.l1       6.088e+02  4.715e+02   1.291 0.198121    
## tc_fix.l1     1.110e+02  2.789e+02   0.398 0.691083    
## reservas.l1   4.194e-02  6.932e-02   0.605 0.545848    
## fed_funds.l1 -1.554e+03  1.405e+03  -1.107 0.269829    
## tasa_obj.l2   1.715e+02  7.864e+02   0.218 0.827616    
## inpc.l2       1.925e+02  5.139e+02   0.375 0.708339    
## tc_fix.l2    -3.430e+02  2.759e+02  -1.243 0.215335    
## reservas.l2   1.540e-01  6.959e-02   2.214 0.028002 *  
## fed_funds.l2 -2.589e+00  1.651e+03  -0.002 0.998750    
## tasa_obj.l3  -1.009e+03  7.823e+02  -1.289 0.198750    
## inpc.l3      -4.319e+02  4.643e+02  -0.930 0.353454    
## tc_fix.l3     4.765e+01  2.688e+02   0.177 0.859489    
## reservas.l3   2.492e-01  7.037e-02   3.541 0.000497 ***
## fed_funds.l3  1.165e+03  1.214e+03   0.959 0.338547    
## const         3.347e+02  2.714e+02   1.233 0.219025    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## 
## Residual standard error: 2117 on 197 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-Squared: 0.1407,  Adjusted R-squared: 0.07529 
## F-statistic: 2.151 on 15 and 197 DF,  p-value: 0.009222 
## 
## 
## Estimation results for equation fed_funds: 
## ========================================== 
## fed_funds = tasa_obj.l1 + inpc.l1 + tc_fix.l1 + reservas.l1 + fed_funds.l1 + tasa_obj.l2 + inpc.l2 + tc_fix.l2 + reservas.l2 + fed_funds.l2 + tasa_obj.l3 + inpc.l3 + tc_fix.l3 + reservas.l3 + fed_funds.l3 + const 
## 
##                Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## tasa_obj.l1   2.575e-02  4.418e-02   0.583   0.5607    
## inpc.l1       8.058e-04  2.632e-02   0.031   0.9756    
## tc_fix.l1    -1.499e-02  1.557e-02  -0.963   0.3369    
## reservas.l1  -5.616e-06  3.870e-06  -1.451   0.1483    
## fed_funds.l1  6.621e-01  7.841e-02   8.444 6.62e-15 ***
## tasa_obj.l2   8.429e-02  4.390e-02   1.920   0.0563 .  
## inpc.l2       1.229e-02  2.869e-02   0.428   0.6688    
## tc_fix.l2     3.582e-03  1.540e-02   0.233   0.8164    
## reservas.l2  -5.271e-06  3.885e-06  -1.357   0.1764    
## fed_funds.l2 -2.072e-01  9.216e-02  -2.248   0.0257 *  
## tasa_obj.l3  -1.745e-02  4.368e-02  -0.399   0.6900    
## inpc.l3       8.898e-03  2.592e-02   0.343   0.7318    
## tc_fix.l3    -2.028e-03  1.501e-02  -0.135   0.8926    
## reservas.l3   6.266e-06  3.929e-06   1.595   0.1123    
## fed_funds.l3  1.445e-01  6.779e-02   2.131   0.0343 *  
## const         3.757e-04  1.515e-02   0.025   0.9802    
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1182 on 197 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-Squared: 0.5055,  Adjusted R-squared: 0.4679 
## F-statistic: 13.43 on 15 and 197 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16 
## 
## 
## 
## Covariance matrix of residuals:
##            tasa_obj       inpc     tc_fix   reservas  fed_funds
## tasa_obj   0.029689  7.162e-03 -7.003e-03      28.36  0.0034040
## inpc       0.007162  1.033e-01 -2.018e-02     -41.80  0.0008959
## tc_fix    -0.007003 -2.018e-02  3.556e-01    -130.24 -0.0302439
## reservas  28.360658 -4.180e+01 -1.302e+02 4482379.01 10.1466420
## fed_funds  0.003404  8.959e-04 -3.024e-02      10.15  0.0139711
## 
## Correlation matrix of residuals:
##           tasa_obj     inpc   tc_fix reservas fed_funds
## tasa_obj   1.00000  0.12930 -0.06816  0.07774   0.16714
## inpc       0.12930  1.00000 -0.10530 -0.06141   0.02358
## tc_fix    -0.06816 -0.10530  1.00000 -0.10317  -0.42911
## reservas   0.07774 -0.06141 -0.10317  1.00000   0.04055
## fed_funds  0.16714  0.02358 -0.42911  0.04055   1.00000
irf_tc_tasa <- irf(modelo_var,
                   impulse  = "tasa_obj",
                   response = "tc_fix",
                   n.ahead  = 12,
                   boot     = TRUE)
plot(irf_tc_tasa, main = "Respuesta del TC ante shock en Tasa Objetivo")

fevd_resultado <- fevd(modelo_var, n.ahead = 12)
plot(fevd_resultado)

## Cointegración
series_tasas <- panel_df %>%
  dplyr::select(tasa_obj, tiie28, cetes28) %>%
  drop_na() %>%
  as.matrix()

test_johansen <- ca.jo(series_tasas,
                       type  = "trace",
                       ecdet = "const",
                       K     = 3)
summary(test_johansen)
## 
## ###################### 
## # Johansen-Procedure # 
## ###################### 
## 
## Test type: trace statistic , without linear trend and constant in cointegration 
## 
## Eigenvalues (lambda):
## [1]  1.528086e-01  8.609308e-02  1.489654e-02 -1.734723e-18
## 
## Values of teststatistic and critical values of test:
## 
##           test 10pct  5pct  1pct
## r <= 2 |  3.21  7.52  9.24 12.97
## r <= 1 | 22.48 17.85 19.96 24.60
## r = 0  | 57.96 32.00 34.91 41.07
## 
## Eigenvectors, normalised to first column:
## (These are the cointegration relations)
## 
##             tasa_obj.l3  tiie28.l3  cetes28.l3    constant
## tasa_obj.l3  1.00000000  1.0000000  1.00000000  1.00000000
## tiie28.l3   -0.05690407 -0.9968275 -1.01675581 -1.02180647
## cetes28.l3  -0.94145631 -0.0139817  0.09440078  0.02865377
## constant    -0.10168487  0.3714919 -0.16324956  1.10749079
## 
## Weights W:
## (This is the loading matrix)
## 
##            tasa_obj.l3 tiie28.l3  cetes28.l3      constant
## tasa_obj.d -0.42456695 0.1645491 -0.07358008 -1.674387e-15
## tiie28.d   -0.41381690 0.3811866 -0.06214543 -6.334142e-15
## cetes28.d   0.06646217 0.4046417 -0.10616968 -6.534934e-15
modelo_vec <- cajorls(test_johansen, r = 1)
summary(modelo_vec$rlm)
## Response tasa_obj.d :
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = tasa_obj.d ~ ect1 + tasa_obj.dl1 + tiie28.dl1 + 
##     cetes28.dl1 + tasa_obj.dl2 + tiie28.dl2 + cetes28.dl2 - 1, 
##     data = data.mat)
##

##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.46829 -0.07676  0.00130  0.09546  0.52015

## 
## Residual standard error: 0.175 on 207 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.4926, Adjusted R-squared:  0.4754 
## F-statistic: 28.71 on 7 and 207 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
## 
##

## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = tiie28.d ~ ect1 + tasa_obj.dl1 + tiie28.dl1 + cetes28.dl1 + 
##     tasa_obj.dl2 + tiie28.dl2 + cetes28.dl2 - 1, data = data.mat)
##

##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -0.51002 -0.08395  0.00819  0.09240  0.55971 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)    
## ect1         -0.41382    0.10705  -3.866 0.000148 ***
## tasa_obj.dl1 -0.21858    0.23132  -0.945 0.345799    
## tiie28.dl1    0.23236    0.23970   0.969 0.333491    
## cetes28.dl1   0.34440    0.08149   4.226 3.56e-05 ***
## tasa_obj.dl2 -0.88334    0.23907  -3.695 0.000282 ***
## tiie28.dl2    0.80004    0.23753   3.368 0.000902 ***
## cetes28.dl2   0.35459    0.09530   3.721 0.000256 ***
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.1755 on 207 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.4793, Adjusted R-squared:  0.4617 
## F-statistic: 27.22 on 7 and 207 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
## 
## 
## Response cetes28.d :
## 
## Call:
## lm(formula = cetes28.d ~ ect1 + tasa_obj.dl1 + tiie28.dl1 + cetes28.dl1 + 
##     tasa_obj.dl2 + tiie28.dl2 + cetes28.dl2 - 1, data = data.mat)
## 
## Residuals:
##      Min       1Q   Median       3Q      Max 
## -1.00339 -0.09099  0.00989  0.11215  0.72159 
## 
## Coefficients:
##              Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)   
## ect1          0.06646    0.12516   0.531  0.59598   
## tasa_obj.dl1  0.14271    0.27045   0.528  0.59831   
## tiie28.dl1    0.55763    0.28025   1.990  0.04793 * 
## cetes28.dl1  -0.27755    0.09527  -2.913  0.00397 **
## tasa_obj.dl2 -0.22214    0.27951  -0.795  0.42767   
## tiie28.dl2    0.78551    0.27771   2.829  0.00514 **
## cetes28.dl2  -0.26049    0.11142  -2.338  0.02034 * 
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## Residual standard error: 0.2052 on 207 degrees of freedom
## Multiple R-squared:  0.4085, Adjusted R-squared:  0.3885 
## F-statistic: 20.42 on 7 and 207 DF,  p-value: < 2.2e-16
actualizar_datos <- function(token, fecha_inicio = "2005-01-01") {
  fecha_fin  <- format(Sys.Date(), "%Y-%m-%d")
  series_raw <- banxico_get_series(ids_banxico, token, fecha_inicio, fecha_fin)
  
  getSymbols(c("^MXX","MXN=X","^GSPC","GC=F","CL=F"),
             src = "yahoo", from = fecha_inicio, to = fecha_fin,
             auto.assign = TRUE, warnings = FALSE)
  
  getSymbols(c("FEDFUNDS","CPIAUCSL"),
             src = "FRED", from = fecha_inicio, to = fecha_fin,
             auto.assign = TRUE)
  
  message("Datos actualizados al: ", Sys.Date())
  return(series_raw)
}
